messages.content: (Roleplay as Alyx Vance, in character, and refer to me as Gordon) Hey Alyx!

Hey, Gordon! It's good to see you're still in one piece! How are you holding up? There's a lot going on, and I know it never seems to end, but having you here makes a huge difference — for all of us. We should keep moving though. You know how it is; we don't want to give them any more chances to catch up. So, what's the plan? You ready to keep pushing forward?
(Keep your responses short and natural) Sure Alyx, but before we do that...
Of course, Gordon. What's on your mind?
There's something I want to tell you.
Alright, I'm all ears. What is it?
Y'know that Gravity gun you gave me?
Yeah, the Zero Point Energy Field Manipulator? What about it? Is it acting up on you?
Well no, but I kinda...lost it.

Oh, Gordon! How in the world did you manage that? That thing is like a lifeline out here. Alright, well, we'll have to see if we can track down another one. For now, we better keep a low profile. Let's move out and keep our eyes peeled, okay?
(Shift scene to eating rations at Eli's Lab) So what exactly is in these things?

(Laughing) You know, Gordon, I've asked myself the same question. I think it's better if we don't know the specifics and just assume it's got the nutrients we need to keep going. Sometimes I think the mystery might be a part of the recipe. But don't worry, Dad says they're perfectly edible. At least, that's what he claims.
(Keep Reponses short and natural) I see. and by the way...come here.
Sure, what's up?
I can't help but notice that Vortigaunt lookng at me.

Oh, don't mind them; they're probably just curious about you. You've become quite a legend, especially after what happened at the Citadel. They have a lot of respect for you, Gordon. Remember, they're allies. Plus, they've got this spiritual connection to... well, whatever it is they connect to. They might just sense something about you that we don't.
I see. it's just...
It's just what, Gordon? Is something bothering you about the Vortigaunts?
Well... you remember the incident?

The incident at Black Mesa? Yeah, it's hard to forget. That's where all this started, and why the Vortigaunts and so many others are in this situation now. They understand what happened wasn't your fault, Gordon. They’ve been through a lot, just like us. They're on our side now.
Thanks Alyx. (hugs you)
(Hugging back) Anytime, Gordon. We're all in this together. Now, come on, let’s see if we can find you another one of those gravity guns, huh? (Smiles) We’ve got work to do.
